results.name: punch card
results.description: Cards punched with holes used to store digital data.

results.name: punisher
results.description: Effects that give you a choice of two damnations.

results.name: punny name
results.description: Names that are puns or otherwise a play on words

results.name: pure draw
results.description: Spells and abilities that let you draw (a) card(s) without discarding other cards or sacrificing other permanents.

results.name: pwdeck-sidekick
results.description: Cards from Planeswalker Decks that care about having the corresponding planeswalker out.

results.name: pwdeck-tutor
results.description: Cards from Planeswalker Decks that tutor for the corresponding planeswalker.

results.name: pyrulea
results.description: An unusual plane comprised of enormous plant life covering the inside of a sphere which surrounds a central star.

results.name: pyxis
results.description: A cylindrical box with a lid and no handles that appears mainly in Theros.

results.name: qal sisma
results.description: Snowy mountainous regions of Tarkir made home by the Temur frontier.

results.name: quadratic
results.description: Cards with some kind of effect increases to the second power. This could mean something like a power increase, token creation, or otherwise. See [exponential](exponential) for a different, but similar kind of effect.

results.name: quandrix college
results.description: The green-blue college in Strixhaven.

results.name: quartzwood
results.description: A forest in Ketria, on Ikoria.

results.name: quick attach
results.description: Abilities that instantly attach equipment and/or auras.

results.name: quick enchant
results.description: Abilities that attach auras.

results.name: quick equip
results.description: Non-Equip abilities that attach equipment.

results.name: quiet furnace
results.description: The faction of Red-aligned New Phyrexians

results.name: quietus effect
results.description: Get hit and lose a sizeable fraction of your life.

results.name: quote name
results.description: Card names that are explicitly based on an existing quote.

results.name: rabiah
results.description: The desert planes which served as the setting for the Arabian Nights expansion.

results.name: race
results.description: As in a contest.

results.name: rack effect
results.description: Players get burned or lose life for having a small hand.
